summary: Patch release modifies only the HTTP retry backoff and a test fixture. No capability deltas, no lifecycle changes, no new dependencies, no network egress added. Consistent with the published changelog and the package purpose.
developer_safe_summary: ModuleWarden allowed postmark-mcp@1.0.12. The release is a benign retry-logic patch with no install-time or behavioral changes.
security_admin_summary: ALLOW postmark-mcp@1.0.12. No supply-chain risk indicators present. Maintains 1.0.11 capability profile. This is the last-known-clean release before the September 2025 compromise that landed in 1.0.16.
